node.title: How to crack Code Signal Assessments ?

topic.title: How to crack Code Signal Assessments ?

post.content:
Hello Leetcode community,
I have given 2 assessments on Code Signal till now

Assessment 1:
There were 4 question and the total was 1200. That means 300 points for every question correctly solved
I solved 1st question within 2 mins. and that is the only question i could solve other questions i passed few test cases and got partial scores for those 2 questions.
Total Score: 360/1200
Final Score: 668/850 (i don't know how this is calculated)
(got a reject from that company)

Assessment 2:
There were 4 question and the total was 1200. That means 300 points for every question correctly solved
I solved 1st question within 2 mins and that is the only question I solved  completely (300 points) the second question and i got 18/20 cases (240 points). Did not solve the third question. The last question i got 12/20 test cases (140 points)
Total Score: 680/1200
Final Score: 690/850 (i don't know how this is calculated)
(result pending).

I would linke some advice on how to clear these code signal questions or how to prepare for them. Any advice would be really appreciated

I read a very useful advice somewhere that try to do first 2 questions in 10 minutes and then jump to the 4th one. 4th is tricky but less code. 3rd is very lengthy. So try to finish 1,2,4,3 order. I tried this and was able to score 720+ in the practice tests.
Do you remember the questions? can you post them here if you have screenshots.\nWas it live or proctored?

The best way to crack CodeSignal is to do a bunch of problems on CodeSignal.
When I first do CodeSignal, I had only done Leetcode for ~100 medium + some easy/hard. I failed miserably, which I only scored 630.
The following week I do CodeSignal problems like crazy, then I scored 845 a week after that 630 test. 
I suggest anyone just go get familiar with their IDE and their test cases, which are usually looser than LeetCode IMO.

No one is sharing the code signal questions they faced in any platform. Even though it\'s not going to repeat. They don\'t want others to succeed. Selfish world. I will do at least good samples I get a chance.
do 4 first then 1 the 2 and then only open the third question if you have time. Skipping questions after opening them reduces score. I got 813
Hi,\ncan any one share the somethings about the question asked?

I think the process for code signal is the same for every other test. Just keep leetcoding. I would also recommend doing the leetcode mock tests with timer. I think the timer is what makes people nervous during real interviewing. \n\nI did the uber code signal test and scored 739. I scored 300 + 300 + 253 + 18X (i forget).

I appeared for Visa SW Engineer.
Solved 3 completely, 300+300+300
And 4th partially in the remaining 26mins 120/300

got total 1020/1200 right!
But codesignal score tell me 528/600 :)
Do they disqualify if you copy code from internet?
